title: Smoked British Turkey Hash
description: A hearty, comforting hash dish featuring crispy smoked turkey and British ingredients. Perfect for a satisfying breakfast or brunch.
instructions: 1. Heat the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the diced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
4. Add the diced smoked turkey breast and cook until heated through.
5. Stir in the diced crispy hash browns.
6. Season with black pepper to taste.
8. If desired, top with additional crispy hash browns or a fried egg.
